subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Quli! Upon thee be My glory. Hearken unto My call from the precincts of the Prison, for verily it giveth thee to drink of the Kawthar of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل قلی علیک بهائی اسمع ندائی من شطر السجن انه یسقیک کوثر البیان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
